content:
📌 Relevant Presentation & Readings:
• Week 1 | How to Prewrite for Your Assignment (Presentation)
• Chapter 4 Section 1 - Apply Prewriting Methods
• Chapter 4 Section 2 - Outlining

📌 Assignment Reminder:
• The Narrative Essay - Prewriting will be assigned on Day 3

V. Independent Work Time (35 minutes)
1. Tasks for Today
• Read through Week 1 Overview and Learning Outcomes in Canvas.
• Reflect on today’s writing warm-up and grammar discussions.
• Complete readings:
• Week 1 | The Writing Process (Presentation)
• Week 1 | It’s All in the Process (Presentation)
2. Instructor Role
• Walk around and offer guidance.
• Answer questions about grammar concepts and the narrative essay.
• Provide one-on-one feedback on warm-up responses.

VI. Closing Discussion (5 minutes)
1. Reflection Questions
• What was your biggest takeaway from today’s session?
